collect_item.character: hidden egg indicator - different noise when striking hidden egg location

distinctive_elements: Hidden egg detection sound - distinct noise indicating egg location

extraction_notes: Available sources contain no documented music tempos, keys, chord progressions, channel counts, sound chip information, or detailed SFX characteristics by area. Wikipedia credits composer Miyoshi Okuyama but provides no musical analysis. Only documented audio element is the hidden egg indicator sound mentioned in gameplay mechanics.
